mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicles ( user_id, license_number, manufacturer, model, model_year, engine_type, mileage, color, vin, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{licenseNumber}, #{manufacturer}, #{model}, #{modelYear}, #{engineType}, #{mileage}, #{color}, #{vin}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, license_number, manufacturer, model, year, engine_type, mileage, color, vin, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM vehicles WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, license_number, manufacturer, model, year, engine_type, mileage, color, vin, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM vehicles WHERE license_number = #{licenseNumber} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, license_number, manufacturer, model, year, engine_type, mileage, color, vin, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM vehicles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, license_number, manufacturer, model, year, engine_type, mileage, color, vin, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM vehicles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicles SET license_number = #{licenseNumber}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, model = #{model}, model_year = #{modelYear}, engine_type = #{engineType}, mileage = #{mileage}, color = #{color}, vin = #{vin}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE vehicles SET mileage = #{mileage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, license_number, manufacturer, model, year, engine_type, mileage, color, vin, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM vehicles WHERE manufacturer = #{manufacturer} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, user_id, license_number, manufacturer, model, year, engine_type, mileage, color, vin, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM vehicles WHERE year BETWEEN #{startYear} AND #{endYear} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY year DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, user_id, license_number, manufacturer, model, year, engine_type, mileage, color, vin, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM vehicles WHERE engine_type = #{engineType} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}
